reviews.text: I was reaching out to various law firms regarding an issue with my insurance policy. Another highly reputable firm responded quickly, and I was exploring my options while being transparent with everyone. However, once Bemis Roach and Reed Law Firm learned I was in contact with other firms, they completely stopped replying to my emails. When a firm shows they don’t value your business, take it as a sign. I strongly recommend choosing a more professional and dependable law firm, especially for those unfamiliar with the legal process who need trustworthy guidance. Bemis Roach and Reed failed to provide any explanations or information. I urge you to look elsewhere. Another firm promptly took on my case based solely on the details I shared, no hassle. Perhaps Bemis Roach and Reed stopped responding because they felt they couldn’t compete, but that’s no excuse for ghosting a potential client. Transparency is far more respectable.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Online reviews serve two purposes: They educate the public about whether the public may want to interact with the business. And they give the reviewed business constructive criticism so that the business can learn from the experience and improve its performance.

This review accomplishes neither. Dom does not provide any information other than he/she called "regarding an issue with my insurance policy." Bemis, Roach & Reed is a disability law firm. If a potential client calls with a question about health insurance, auto insurance, homeowner's insurance, etc., we politely explain that we do not practice in those areas and we refer the potential to more appropriate resources. There are any number of reasons the firm might not do more than offer a referral or have only an initial contact with a potential.

I entirely agree with Dom about transparency. Potential clients also need to be transparent. Dom assumes we stopped replying to emails because he/she disclosed that other firms were contacted. He/she is wrong. The firm started in 1993. I can assure you that we do not discontinue communication with potentials because they are interviewing other attorneys. You cannot stay in the legal business for more than 30 years by turning down clients with meritorious claims.

More likely, Dom has a legal issue outside of our practice area or has a claim that we viewed as not worth pursuing. We will never know given that he/she did not follow up with us or provide sufficient information in the review for us to investigate.

Some keyboard warriors just like to vent. I invite her/him to contact me to discuss the matter.


Greg Reed, Partner

reviews.text: DO NOT RECOMMEND AT ALL!!! The first problem was at intake. I was told I would get a response about my case within a couple of days, but I had to reach back out after a few weeks because I didn’t hear from anyone. I was dealing with one young lady, but when I called back I was pushed to someone else. It took them months to get back with me and I almost missed my chance for a hearing. Once they agreed to take me on as a client I was assigned a case manager Craig Roach, who was great and said I had a good case. Greg Reed was my attorney, but I was informed within a month before my hearing that he was unavailable on that date, even though the hearing date was sent out months ago, so I  was assigned a new attorney which was Daniel Messenger. He then preps me, only to tell me we will lose. Remind you they had my info for months and if my records weren’t sufficient enough then they had all that time to let me know, but he waited until the end to say I need to withdraw from having a hearing. He seemed more against me than for me. He didn’t even fight for me to get an outcome, he pretty much gave up on me! The first thing out of his mouth was we will likely withdraw ourselves from your case. My thing is you all had my info for months, so why wait until the end to turn me away! He then tells me I don’t see my doctors enough, seeing four doctors every three months was not enough. He acts like he didn’t understand that I couldn’t see my doctors for a year because I lost insurance and couldn’t afford to pay out of pocket, instead he kept telling me how I didn’t do enough to get an approval. It seems this law firm will take easy cases, but if it’s one they have to actually work hard for then they don’t want you. I will try again but I won’t be using this firm.
reviews.ownerResponse:
I am sorry Ms. Clark is disappointed with our representation. However, we rely on our clients to give us full and honest information about their health and work history. Information develops as the case moves forward. When we obtain new information that conflicts with what we were told, we give advice to our clients based on how the information affects the case. Sometimes the information learned is case ending. Yes, we recommended that Ms. Clark withdraw her claim.
Greg Reed

Everyone at Silverleaf has been fantastic, they have earned our business for life!
Tom answered all of or questions and gave us information we had been unaware of prior to our meeting.  It was truly a learning experience, and we couldn’t have asked for a better meeting.

We found the Thomas’ seminar insightful. We also appreciate the one-hour complimentary appointment to review our trust and will. We were convinced that Tom was the right person to revise and update those documents.
Silverleaf seminar was very informative and entertaining with the presentation. Worth the time.

Pretty sad when you do all of the leg work and simply ask a clerk who gives you a 20 minute free consultation to have the Attorney call to see if he is interested in a million dollar probate case on a 30% contingency basis and it is already filed with a court date and they want to charge me $400.00 just to speak with him.
Very greedy and very sad considering most Attorneys not only provide a free consultation but also would jump at a case like this with little work to be done!
I don’t recommend this firm, look elsewhere!

We recently worked with Tom Fortenberry at the Silverleaf Legal Group to create our will, and we couldn’t be more pleased with the experience. Tom was incredibly easy to work with—professional, patient, and genuinely focused on helping us make the best decisions for our situation.
He explained everything in clear, easy‑to‑understand terms and asked thoughtful, relevant questions that helped us consider details we might have overlooked. We also really appreciated how upfront he was about the cost. Everything was transparent from the start with no surprises.
If you’re looking for an attorney who is knowledgeable, thorough, and truly client‑focused, we highly recommend Tom Fortenberry and the Silverleaf Legal Group. He made the entire process smooth and gave us real peace of mind.

Tom Fortenberry, founder and managing attorney at Silverleaf Legal Group, met with us one on one to go over our estate planning. He was kind, courteous, knowledgeable.  He quickly understood our wishes and needs for our estate planning. He made the process much easier than we thought possible. We highly recommend him and his group for any estate planning you may need.
Mr Fortenberry was a pleasure to work with during our visit to setup a trust for our family. He was very patient and knowledgeable,

I went to a workshop that was very educational and beneficial. The info Tom presented was very detailed and the info packet is very useful. I learned so much from the Seminar. I knew when the Seminar was over that I wanted to go with Silverleaf Legal Group. I was scheduled for a consultation with Tom right away. He came up with a plan that works for my needs. Looking forward to working with Tom and his team.

Met with Tom Fortenberry to discuss a Family Trust and as expected he was on top of everything and explained the process clearly. He has done work for me in the past and I’ve always been very satisfied.
very knowable - great experience

Tom gave a phenomenal 2-hour presentation explaining the difference between wills and revocable trusts, along with personal experiences with clients, as to which he recommended, why and when.  During my consultation, he listened to my goals to protect my assets for myself and my family and together we decided on a plan to execute.  I am comfortable and confident with my decisions and would recommend Silverleaf Legal Group to anyone seeking estate planning advice.
Tom and his team are knowledgeable and efficient.  They are creating a trust for us and we are extremely happy with their work!
Thomas was very thorough and forthright in his assessment of my estate situation and gave me solid advice in our consultation.  I highly recommend Thomas Fortenberry and Silverleaf Legal Group.

My husband and I attended the Silverleaf Legal Group’s free estate planning seminar and found it incredibly informative and easy to follow. The one-hour complimentary consultation afterward provided really valuable insight and clarity. Tom walked us through our specific situation with thoroughness and genuine care. We left feeling very confident about our estate planning decisions.

We highly recommend Silverleaf Legal Group for anyone seeking trustworthy guidance and a team that genuinely cares and takes the time to help.

Straightforward, professional yet personable.  Truly enjoyed discussing our family estate planning with Mr. Tom F.  After our meeting, he sent a follow-up email reiterating everything we discussed, his understanding of our intentions, and details on how he will achieve our voiced desires.  Looking forward to using Silverleaf Legal for all our estate planning needs.  Thanks

Tom and team at Silverleaf Legal Group take the time to understand your situation and your issues and provide multiple avenues for resolution.  The knowledge and expertise Tom possesses is hard to find and we truly appreciate the Silverleaf Legal team as our families trusted partner!

Worked with Dan Izzo and had a really good experience. He and his team treated me right the whole way through. They were respectful, easy to reach, and took the time to answer my questions without making me feel rushed.
If you’re in Round Rock and need a lawyer, I’d definitely recommend Izzo & Associates.

I cannot recommend John Izzo & Associates PLC highly enough. From the very beginning, John demonstrated exceptional professionalism, integrity, and dedication to my case. He approaches every situation with a calm, strategic mindset and a deep understanding of the law, which immediately gave me confidence that I was in capable hands.

What truly sets John apart is his unwavering support for his clients. He genuinely cares about achieving the best possible outcome—not only for his clients, but especially for their children. Throughout the entire process, he remained attentive, responsive, and compassionate, ensuring that every decision was made with long-term stability and well-being in mind.

John is extremely knowledgeable and experienced, and it shows in the way he navigates complex legal matters with clarity and precision. He doesn’t back down when advocating for his clients and consistently works to secure the strongest possible results.

If you are looking for an attorney who combines professionalism, experience, and heartfelt dedication, John Izzo & Associates PLC is an outstanding choice.

John and Meredith helped me with my child custody case. Being the grandparent, It was a complicated one. John is a no nonsense shoot straight kind of guy. He and or Meredith where their to answer all my questions and helped me gather everything I needed for court. I got custody. Years later they were there when I needed them again, with good advice. I highly recommend This law firm!

John and his team did a great job keeping me informed and giving me the information straight.  They were incredibly honest with me about my case and what to expect.  It’s rare today to find people who truly want to help.  Thanks again!

John, Meredith, and the Izzo  team helped me navigate a very difficult custody situation  several years ago.  I am forever grateful to them for their compassion, support, professionalism, and expertise in helping me gain custodial custody of my son.  Even though I was a full time working father, I followed their guidance, and followed all the mandated guidelines and was rewarded.  I strongly recommend their team in dealing with any family legal matter that may come up!

I found the best Attorney to help me in my divorce. I was going through tough times, and John Izzo was my knight in shinning armor. He helped me with not only my case, but truly gave me the best advise on how to put family first and take care of myself. He was extremely professional and I was so amazed how fast he was able to get things done. EVEN DURING COVID!!! My kids and I are in a better place because Mr. Izzo and Ms. Meredith helped make it happen! 100% Customer Satisfaction !!! They are a great team to have in your corner.
God Bless this office! If you someone who can really help you in your time in need, CALL THIS OFFICE.

If me and my family are ever in need of their services again they will be the first law firm I'll call. Not once but twice, both times was the best experience. Thank you for everything you did for us.

Charged us $3k for doing nothing. They filed a petition on our behalf in the WRONG court. Had to get another lawyer to dismiss the case. John never contacted the opposing lawyer over the 3-4 month period, claiming that they were a cheap Rent-a-lawyer, which made the other lawyer mad thinking that we were stonewalling them. Had to spend a lot of money to undo the mess they put us in.

Hiring this firm was one of my biggest regrets. From the beginning, I was told I had a strong case — but I walked away with the exact same outcome I would have gotten without spending thousands of dollars. I worked with one attorney the entire time, but on my court date, a completely different attorney I had never met showed up.

I told them many times I couldn’t afford to pay the bills, (that was what his lawyers wanted me to do) but the only option I was given still left me paying for them — the exact same result I would have gotten anyway. I never felt like they had my best interest in mind. Instead, I felt rushed into decisions, pressured when I was already in financial crisis, and spoken to like I was stupid. John spoke to me with no respect, spoke over me, and as if he wasn’t on my side.

They made feel like a burden, like I was the problem, and like I was fighting them instead of the other side. I left this process feeling humiliated, broke, and completely unheard. I’m still married and spent thousands of dollars for TEMPORARY ORDERS!

If you are looking for a lawyer who will actually listen, explain your options, and fight for you when you are at your most vulnerable, I would strongly recommend going elsewhere.

Go somewhere else and get an attorney that isnt wasting your time and money, and might actually care enough to pay attention to your case. My gf recently used them and here's a list of things she experienced...
- Taking $1500 for an easy filing that shouldn't have taken that much time or money.
- Using almost $1k on interviewing a witness they didn't subpoena who didn't testify and still charging.
- Multiple phone calls charging by the minute only to ask the same questions either because they didn't prep themselves before or didn't remember.
- Interrupting the client during the calls and not letting the client explain the situation, leading to further confusion and their misunderstanding of facts.
- Misconstruing facts on a timeline after it was given to them in detail in order to prep for court.
- Handing off the case to multiple attorneys all the way up to the day of the trial where they show up with an attorney who knew absolutely nothing about the case and fumbled during negotiations. Had to call into other attorneys to ask questions in the front of the court room to find out whats going on.

These guys are clearly out for the money, don't care, and are not organized enough to be effective for someone in need of actual help because they will milk you extravagantly for every penny only to be ineffective assistance of counsel. My gf depleted her savings and 401k only to be unheard, charged, and brought to court with someone who knew nothing about her case. Bang up job.

Wasted a year and 6 grand plus dad's 2300 through another law firm they got help from. And had a issue with a house, ex wasn't paying and ruined my credit and they took almost a year to reword the decree for equity and when I stepped forward to share my thoughts with judge.  He said we'd be back and 2 days later,  they finished what they were doing. SMH. And still house is under my name ruining my credit.  And they had so many things in decree to go with that wasn't being done by EX

Atty Izzo and his staff is amazing. I started filing for divorce in 2018 and was officially divorced on June 16, 2021. When I first met with Atty Izzo I already knew by the first introduction that he was going to change my life. Communication was easy. Patience is key which I have a lot of. I just had a piece of mind because it was easy to get a hold of them for an update and Dahlia was amazing with keeping me posted. I still have to stop by the office to show them my appreciation in person and give a picture of my son and I which I plan on doing so soon! I'll forever be grateful!

These guys are the REAL DEAL!!!!
Dan is one hell of an attorney! He got my husband the best deal ever for our son. We get to finally be a family —enjoy holidays, full summers, & most importantly be there for all the growing moments together. ALSO, Dan, Meredith, & John pulled a rabbit out of their hat from 1K a month of child support to $200! That’s right, $200!!! That’s completely unheard of & legendary!!! Dan is the calmest, no matter what situation you’re in & in trial. John is amazing from intake to the end & extremely knowledgeable about everything. Meredith is amazing & fierce which was a perfect addition to our complex case. No matter how busy they get, they will ALWAYS get back to you instantly with a lot of information; they never waste anyone’s time. Dahlia is amazing & is on it from start to finish! If you need your attorneys she will keep you at ease & a great problem solver!
No matter how ugly & bumpy our journey was, these guys all stayed by our sides & did their job giving their 110% & I couldn’t be anymore grateful for each & every one of them. Dan & John are the man!!

Thank you Izzo & Associates for being the best & biggest blessing to our family!♥️

If I could give more stars I would! If you have second thoughts, don’t even think about it, or hurt no longer…just hire them!

John and Meredith has helped tremendously with Dahlia. Their team helped me with my divorce decree battle over the last three years. They have stood by my side and they were like second family to me. They are God send to me and my children.
I couldn’t find any words on how awesome they work my case. I am very grateful and blessed to have them fight for me. Thank you and my Family appreciate you.❤️🙏🏻
The only team that took the time to listen and was willing to help.

This firm is so amazing and dedicated to their clients. They made sure my child support case went smooth with no hassle at all. Thank you John and your team for the wonder service you provided for me.🤙🏾🖤

I gave a 2 star because eventually we got passed the custody phase for my neice so they deserved the courtesy of at least that. I was told to wait 6 months after custody was final and then we'd file for adoption.

At the 6 month mark, mind you I was very patient, I called, texted, emailed, and left voicemails for both John Izzo and Merideth Semler for months.

I waited days and sometimes weeks between contact attempts. Spoke to their assistant many times and was assured I'd receive a call. After wasting months I gave up and found new counsel. Shame on me for allowing such unprofessional business practices for so long.

A courtesy call, email, or SOMETHING would have been nice if they had become to busy for my case.

I sure hope you don't treat all of your clients this way. As a business owner myself I can't imagine doing this to someone. Especially in a case as sensitive as adoption.

Shame on me for allowing this to carry on so long but shame on you for your unprofessional and careless way of doing business.
Didn’t even get past consultation. John Izzo did not even allow me to speak and talked over me. As a business owner myself,  this is terrible customer service! Especially to a potential client!!

I cannot say enough wonderful things about John and his team. He was my second attorney that I hired for my divorce. They made me feel very important and put my mind at ease.I was going through a very uncomfortable nasty divorce, of course you feel very vulnerable and scared in these situations. John and Meredith really cared about me and my specific situation with custody of my daughter and my assets!  My first attorneys all they cared about was money, unfortunately like many other divorce attorneys. I ended up firing them and going with John and his team!!!! I’m so glad that I did.

John was amazing. He and his staff was there for me at all times during my custody case. He was professional and upfront about everything. I was always aware of what to expect.  John is a very "tell it as it is" kind of person. He is extremely passionate about what he does. I would recommend him to anyone!
reviews.ownerResponse: We appreciate your feedback and review Cathy! Thanks again.

reviews.text: Izzo and his team and very genuine people. They're very tough, hard working, honest and will stick by you through the ups and downs. Highly recommend this firm.

This is definitely my go to legal help in Round Rock. They helped me set up my will and estate and did a fantastic job. Filing was a breeze. I have also referred other friends to them and they have helped immensely with their cases.

I was blown away by the kindness and understanding of Mr. Izzo. I had just called to get to know how much it will cost me to consult him. He was so generous that he literally gave me the next steps to take right away. I was moved by his generosity and commitment to the law that I will certainly be retaining him.

John, Meredith, and team are all true professionals...  We successfully modified a previous divorce decree giving me custody of my girls with exclusive rights!  Living in Williamson County I did not think it would be possible.  Thank you Izzo & Associates for saving my girls and making things right!!!  Give John a call today!

UTTERLY AMAZING. John Izzo and his team are nothing short of miracle workers. We had a complicated case requiring an emergency injunction for a child's safety, and every law firm we'd contacted was either giving us dates a week out (or more), or else turning down the case entirely because there was a possibility it could be transferred to a new jurisdiction once we began.

But John cares deeply about the well-being of children in these tough situations. He and his staff literally ran around the office assembling paperwork, got the forms filed, and we were in front of a judge that same day--just five hours after we walked in! Some of the timing was luck, but there is absolutely no way it would have happened without the truly herculean efforts of John, Meredith, Dahlia and Dan. I have never seen anyone care that much about meeting a deadline that didn't personally affect them, and I am profoundly grateful. If you want a lawyer who works his butt off and makes it happen against all odds, Izzo & Associates is the way to go.
reviews.ownerResponse: We thank you for your feedback and review Jennifer!

reviews.text: Professional, Passionate, and Persistent- three words I use to describe Izzo & Associates. John Izzo and Meredith Semler are an EXCELLENT team!!  I've known John for over three years as he was my divorce attorney in 2015, and we just wrapped up a final hearing in my custody battle. John is very inexpensive as I spent about a third of what my ex-husband did. John and Meredith worked countless hours preparing for the final hearing and their passion and persistence paid off as I won everything I asked for. John went up against two young attorneys and his experience and knowledge, along with my honesty, won our case.  I HIGHLY recommend Izzo & Associates if you're looking for a professional, passionate, and persistent attorney to handle your legal needs.

We appreciate your star rating!
Thank you for your star rating!

reviews.text: If you want to be 10,000 dollars in debt just for this law firm to show up to ONE court hearing then this is the law firm for you!

No show on the soon meeting. Apparently he was 50 minutes late to the meeting. They were so gracious to waive the no show fee that I was to be charged for leaving the meeting after waiting 45 minutes past the meeting time…..

I am pleased to acknowledge the help that I received from Ms. Sarah, today. Despite our situation being outside of their scope of work, she took the time to refer me out and at least we now have alternative options available to us. Thank you Sarah!

If you’re in need of help, advice, and simply just don’t know how to navigate or even simply where to begin. This law firm is where you need to start. From start to finish I can speak from experience that you will be shown what you need to see. Not only will they put every drop of effort into you and your case but they will also educate you on all of your rights and let you know when they are being abused. Do not take your situation for granted. Start off with the best and let the best finish it for you. You will NOT be disappointed.

Worst experience of my life. When I had the initial telephone consultation the person I talk to seem like he was knowing what he was talking about, even told me that the mother of my child was in Contempt of court. Hired them In October to get my simple standard possession. then gave me five different lawyers on my case the day before gave me a new lawyer, who had no idea about the details of the case. Then when we went to court, my lawyer said that me and the mother of my child were married and we never were added three more months of stipulations actually told me if I could get a certificate of graduation of the AA program. I paid $5000 and then they proceeded to ask me for an extra $2000 for doing nothing in my case. I asked them multiple times over the five month period. That I had them as my lawyer who was my lawyer. The portal that they ask you to use is not very user-friendly. The staff was awful anytime. I call up there. They would tell me to use the portal and I have told them that I did and they would never respond to me then had the audacity to ask me for another three grand for mediation when I told him that I couldn’t afford the extra two grand after the five they immediately sent me a motion to withdraw was the worst experience of my life and now have PTSD over finding a lawyer which my case is still open and had to represent myself prose during the mediation process they need to have their bar removed. Awful experience. Will tell anyone to run far far away from Brett Pritchard. I even asked to speak to Brett Pritchard multiple times and had appointments set up then when I was supposed to meet with him, he was never available and had some other lawyer talking to me about my case that knew nothing about It. Awful

I had a great experience working with this law firm. They handled my jurisdiction issue quickly and thoroughly. Their team was professional and knowledgeable. I truly appreciate their support and would highly recommend them to anyone dealing with legal troubles. They made a complicated situation much easier to navigate.
Thank you for your kindness and referral.

Top Quality Service:

Truly a great representative in guiding me through my experience that I had. I'm so grateful  to have their representation.
I came in for a consultation and Mr. Linick was very helpful. I ended up not needing the services but if I ever do he will be my first call.

This law firm, represents why people  cannot trust lawyers. As a mother, going through cancer, who finally gained the courage to leave the most controlling man then put all her money and faith into Mr. Pritchard's firm. I only spoke to of his colleagues twice for fifteen minutes, where I was yelled at while my soon to be ex-husband and father of my children was on his death bed in ICU for a month. During that month, my baby voice celebrated his birthday. During that month, I was there every day still for his dad. I was selfless and humble enough to put things aside for the greater good. This firm told me to shut up as I was rushing into the hospital rounds. Never listen to me. Took every dime I had when i was dealing with the death of why I had to leave the father of my children. The reason I separated from him is the reason he died. And this firm, I took a vow to protect my children and me and did not care. These men are not human. These men will make false promises and take vows to protect innocent children and do what's right. Yet not even hear your voice and care. Then continue to send you bills. When the person you were divorcing is dead from the reason you had to divorce him. That is sick and anyone who uses this firm.I truly wish you the best and pray for you.
Even though they could not help me with my situation they took the time to talk to me and look at other possibilities.
Thank you for your assistance today Sarah!

I would urge anyone looking for a Law firm to pleaseeee go here, very professional and its an understatement to say that they go above and beyond, the greatest Law office in the country in my opinion. i would not use anyone else.

Worst experience with a lawyer. Have had lower costing attorneys that have done much more. Communication was completely lacking. You're passed around to so many people and have to explain everything all over again. You have to do all of your communication through an app.. paid several thousand dollars and went to a court hearing represented by a lawyer from this firm, never even got any paperwork drafted up and sent to me, and now I'm no longer a client and they want me to pay again to go do the whole process over to get the paperwork. No thanks! No one seems to know what's going on and in a time of needing guidance and consistency, I didn't get either. Strongly recommend finding another attorney.

Couldn’t be more grateful for the Pritchard Law Firm. Everything was quick and easy and I felt at ease throughout my entire case knowing I was in good hands. Thank you to my paralegal Dallas for being so responsive & easy to work with!

The Law Office of Brett Pritchard handled my case with care and achieved the goal beyond my expectation! Thank you specifically to Jeff Linnick for winning my court case and to his paralegal, Dallas, for effectively communicating with me during this process. You all are awesome!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks, Glenn! We'll pass along the thanks to Jeff & Dallas!

reviews.text: I wouldn't recommend these guys to my worst enemy. The office creates a layer of attorneys so they can continue to bill you through the chain, burning through your retainer at ungodly speeds. The attorney I worked with (Tim Daniel) did not know anything about my case and made many promises on work that would get done, just to call me weeks later agreeing with my opponent. When I did find a new attorney to work with, Bretts office continued to bill me another $750 for work my NEW ATTORNEY had done - not them. In total it was a giant waste of money that led to little progress in my case.
Very professional firm! The staff was very friendly and helpful, and I always felt well informed through my case. I highly recommend!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Jannie! We're happy you were pleased with the firm as we've worked with you on legal matters.

reviews.text:
I had the opportunity to consult with Chad Harlow (law partner) on a probate matter, and I came away extremely impressed. As an attorney myself with over two decades in the legal profession, I tend to evaluate legal advice carefully and from a fairly critical perspective. Chad stands out as a lawyer who combines deep subject-matter knowledge with a thoughtful and practical approach.

Chad is exceptionally knowledgeable in probate and estate matters. During our discussion, he quickly identified the key legal issues and walked through the potential options with precision. His analysis was clear, well-reasoned, and grounded in both the law and real-world practicality. He has a strong command of probate procedure and anticipates issues that could arise down the road—something that is invaluable in this area of law.

Equally important, Chad is personable and easy to talk to, which makes complex legal topics much easier to understand. He communicates in a straightforward, organized way and takes the time to ensure that the person he is advising fully understands the situation and the potential outcomes. That balance of professionalism and approachability is something not every attorney manages well, but Chad does it naturally.

From one attorney to another, I can say that Chad provides thoughtful, precise, and well-considered advice. He clearly takes his role seriously and approaches his work with diligence and care. Based on my experience speaking with him, I would feel confident referring friends, family members, or clients to him for probate and estate matters.

If you are looking for a skilled, knowledgeable probate attorney in Austin, Chad Harlow is someone I would recommend without hesitation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks so much for the kind words! Chad is a tremendous asset to our clients and we're glad you had a great experience with the firm.

Communication skills are lacking.   Had to provide basic information (such as phone number and email address) several times despite being sent previously [via email] and within the same thread.  Gives the appearance of being disorganized or careless which is frustrating.  Shop around, don’t settle.
reviews.ownerResponse:
The person who left this review has never been my client, and I have never met them. All of my valid reviews are from actual clients.

There are extensive regulations and restrictions on attorney communications. I collect phone numbers and emails using a special intake form that must be signed. This "J J" person says I contacted them by email to ask for their email address? Did I also call them to ask for their phone number?

I've performed over a thousand legal consultations. I speak fluent Spanish. One of my primary functions as an attorney is communicating extremely complex legal issues in a simple to understand manner. I've been doing this successfully for over ten years. I work directly with my clients, and I always make sure my clients are happy.

reviews.text: Joe is absolutely amazing! We were in a bind trying to find a lawyer quickly. We contacted Joe and although he was completely full with clients, he agreed to have us come in and discuss our needs. Once we got there to meet him he was so friendly and knowledgeable. He agreed to take our case on even though he was very limited on time. He literally helped us from beginning to end with every small detail, explained things very thoroughly, and made sure we understood what our options were as well as the process for each option. By the time we were done Joe felt more like a friend than just our lawyer. He still takes the time to discuss things with us when we are unsure of how to proceed with something. He is an absolute blessing and we have been so greatful for the relationship we have gained with him. I highly, highly recommend Joe hands down!

It gives me a great deal of pleasure to comment, favorably, on my attorney, Joseph Anderson of Anderson law Firm in Round Rock,k Texas.  Normally, I'm "leary of lawyers.  After my initial meeting with Joe, my opinion has, of course, revised itself.  During my initial interview the environment of the office portrayed an air of calm and relaxation.  This inspired the ease of conversation and trust.  Joe offered useful, understandable advice to novices dealing with estate and estate planning.  His mannerisms are warm and sincere.  Joe does not show anxiety reflecting the need to rush through facts.  I definitely feel he is there for me and my family.

An Outstanding Law Firm!! I needed an experienced attorney to help and guide me through probate after the death of my husband. A friend recommended Joe Anderson.  I had a lot of fear just thinking about the process and of all the things that needed to be taken care of. Joe Anderson and his staff put me at ease. They are very honest, friendly, knowledgeable and professional. He explained everything step by step and helped me with my needs after probate. It is so refreshing to know that I have a lawyer who can help with all your legal needs while also educating and explaining legal matters in an easy to understand way. Anderson Law Firm is #1 when you are looking for an honest, knowledgeable, reliable, professional, friendly, and down-to-earth lawyer.  All of our estate planning needs (from probate to will to power of attorney and medical directive) have been completed due to the caring professionalism of Joe Anderson. I can't recommend this law firm highly enough.

Amazing law firm!!! I had never been to a lawyer before and was relieved when I met Joe Anderson. He is very friendly, easy to talk to, and professional. I'm not sure there's a legal question he can't answer. Very experienced and effective lawyer!

I highly recommend Keesha Montoya as an exceptional family attorney.  She is very caring, knowledgeable, and works hard to obtain the best outcome.  She tells you everything you need to know and takes her time answering questions.  She does her research and she doesn't forget anything.  In the beginning, my son had no rights at all to his infant daughter, but  it didn't take her long to get overnight visits for my son.  Eventually, Ms. Montoya helped my son get 50% custody of his daughter and we still keep in touch with her.  I can't imagine using anyone other than Ms. Montoya for any family issues.

Thank you Ms.Montoya for getting me my granddaughter back when 10 other attorneys in California & Texas said it could not be done. You are the absolute best. Tanae you are awesome! I am forever grateful for your help and dedication.

If you are looking to assert your grand parent rights Ms Montoya is an expert family law attorney. HIGHLY RECOMMEND HER!

I have been a client of Keesha's for several years now. We have had long, in-depth conversations and that is a rare find amoung lawyers. I have never felt rushed or unheard. She is the type that will listen to everything detail and get the full picture. Very compassionate and somehow not jaded though she has been a lawyer for many successful years. Her best quality though, to be completely transparent with you and not just give lip service. She means what she says, which is exactly what you need if going to court. No one likes surprises. Let the surprises be for the opposing counsel. I truly believe she has an accute understanding of not only court, but personalities. In family court, you need someone who understands people along with law. Hope to have her in my corner for many more years to come. ❤❤❤
Great Office Wonderful Attorney !!!

Keesha is truly a dedicated professional and strives to be an advocate for the children she represents. Her level of compassion, ethics, and high moral standards are immediately evident. She advocates for father's rights of deserving fathers who are oftentimes overlooked. Keesha is very thorough and methodical in her processes to yield the best overall outcome with the most efficiency. I consider myself blessed that I found Keesha to represent my daughter and I. She has greatly assisted me in obtaining 50/50 custody of my daughter right at the outset of my case.  If you are seeking a compassionate, yet highly effective attorney to assist you in your family case; look no further than Keesha Montoya Law.

I would like to recommend Keesha Montoya as an excellent attorney.  She is very caring and extremely passionate about giving rights to deserving fathers.  My newborn daughter was basically snatched away from me when she was one month old, and her mother refused to let me see her.

I feel that God brought me to Ms. Montoya.  She immediately began working to get me rights to have access to my daughter.  Everyone told me that I didn't have a chance because my baby was an infant.  I believe Ms. Montoya set a precedent when she got me not only access to my daughter, but overnight visits as well.  I now have shared custody of my daughter and have her 50% of the time.  I am truly amazed at Ms. Montoya's dedication and determination.

Keesha Montoya fights with everything God gives us to make it right for the babies. Sadly dads aren't fighting as hard or are being frustrated because they think they don't have a chance.  We have to turn this around. She believes God intended Dads to be the key to their children's identity, spiritual/emotional growth and future success.

Because of Ms. Montoya's efforts, my life has been enriched and is fulfilling since I have equal rights to my daughter.  I highly recommend Keesha Montoya to anyone looking for a family attorney who fights for your rights.  She is located in Cedar Park, Texas.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for trusting me (our office) with your beautiful Baby Girl. She’s perfect! Call anytime you need anything. Take care and blessings! K-

reviews.text: I was not a client of keesha Montoya but I paid to retain her in my brothers case. Keesha definitely gets the results you desire in your case. At the end of everything, I sat with Marilyn and Dan Gattis to close my case and I felt their tender care for me as I was one of their own family members (and they assure me I am to this day, “Don’t be a stranger”). This whole process has been a challenge, but Gattis Law Firm was with me holding my hand every step of the way – and I couldn’t imagine anyone else I would have invited to do this for me.

I honestly can’t thank you enough for all that you have done/provided for me. Ya’ll truly exemplify servanthood, honesty, integrity, truth, and above all else, you are for me.

Gattis Law Firm treated me like family.  They were dedicated and compassionate and ensured my case was handled in a timely manor.  I would not hesitate to recommend Gattis Law Firm, not only professional but they are caring , honest and personable.  They maintain high standards for their quality of work.

L Stude
My experience with Gattis Law Firm has been nothing but excellent. Dan is an experienced attorney who fights on the side of justice. If you're looking for someone with integrity, look no further!

I wanted to take a moment to comment on the services rendered by Mr. Gattis and his staff, Marilyn in particular. It is far more frequent that people post negative reviews than take the time to post a review when things go right...or very well. I want to say that Marilyn went above and beyond in my case. She was diligent, timely, thorough, and persistent. She kept me informed and abreast of developments in real time. She is a wonderful, honest, and caring person who made my case managable when I felt it wasn't. Mr. Gattis was everything I needed when I needed it. He counselled in a way that allowed me to feel comfortable and confident. Mr. Gattis is ultimately concerned about his client(s) and doing what he needs to ensure that his clients are treated fairly-which in my case meant putting me before himself. I cannot express how thankful I am for the inital referral to Mr. Gattis and his team, and for the way they resolved my case. This firm was professional, client focused, and persistent with a staff of caring and invested individuals-exactly what every legal team should be!

Professional trustworthy team that cared about me needs and got the job done!

reviews.text: Dustin assisted my family after our car was rear ended at high speed while stopped at a traffic light. My son was injured, and the car was totaled. Our family attorney recommended Dustin, and I hired him because I wanted an attorney who would be personally involved in my case versus a staff attorney with one of the law firms that constantly pesters everyone with annoying television ads. I feel that Dustin got us the best possible settlement for personal injury, and he helped in negotiating a better offer for property damage. My takeaway is consistent with what I expected going into this mess...the insurance companies are terrible to deal with, your offer won't be fair, you'll never be compensated for the lost time dealing with the accident or replacing your car, and you really need an attorney to get the best possible outcome. Thanks Dustin.

reviews.text:
I can’t say enough about how grateful I am for Dustin Fox. I had some legal documents that I was completely overwhelmed by, and without hesitation he jumped in to help me. Even with his busy schedule, he took the time to go through everything carefully and explain it in a way that actually made sense to someone without a legal background.

What stood out most to me was not just his knowledge, but how eager and genuine he was in wanting to help. He didn’t make me feel like I was imposing, even though I wasn’t a paying client — instead, he went out of his way to make sure I understood and felt comfortable with what I was looking at.

Fox’s integrity shows in every interaction. He approaches situations with honesty and fairness, always putting respect for others at the center of how he works. His resilience is equally remarkable — no matter how busy or complex the task, he brings the same calm determination and willingness to find solutions. That combination of integrity, resilience, and respect is rare, and it’s exactly what sets him apart.

That “Fox” personality is exactly why he’s the person you want in your corner: sharp, quick to act, caring, and personable. He has this rare ability to balance being a true professional while also making you feel at ease, which is exactly what you need.

I’m incredibly thankful for his support and would recommend him to anyone — not only because he’s an amazing lawyer, but because he’s an amazing person.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for sharing such a thoughtful review. It truly means a lot to me and my team to know that the time and effort we put into helping others makes a real difference. My goal is always to simplify the legal process and make people feel supported, no matter how complex the documents or situation may be.

Your kind words about integrity, resilience, and respect reflect exactly the values I strive to bring to every interaction, and I’m grateful that came through in your experience. At DFox Law, we believe that caring for people comes first, and everything else follows from that.

I’m so glad I could provide clarity and peace of mind for you, and I truly appreciate your trust and recommendation. Thank you again for letting me be in your corner.

reviews.text: No one ever wants to be in a position to need a lawyer to assist with personal injury. After suffering a brutal dog attack in Fall 2024,  the owners of the dog were unresponsive to my requests for their insurance information. Dustin was recommended to me and as soon as we spoke on the phone, my anxiety over the situation lessened. Dustin is kind, thorough, patient, attentive, and fair. He worked with me on my case for approximately 9 months, going above and beyond in helping me to work with my bizarrely uncooperative medical provider. He checked in with me frequently, letting me know the status. Dustin was also very kind and compassionate about my situation. Erica also worked tirelessly to help get the medical records I needed. She was very responsive whenever I had questions. Dustin procured a very favorable settlement for me, much more than I was anticipating. I hope you never need a personal injury lawyer, but if you do, I cannot say enough good things about Dustin Fox and his team.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for sharing your experience. We know no one ever wants to be in the position of needing a personal injury attorney, but we’re grateful you trusted us to walk with you through such a difficult time.

We know working with medical providers and insurance companies can feel overwhelming, and we are proud that our team, especially Erika’s hard work on your records, was able to help you navigate it.

reviews.text:
My professional experience with D. Fox Law began with an accident in my car. This accident happened like most accidents do; minding your own business, driving down the road, totally unexpected. On my way to my office a motorcycle smashed into my car! The motorcyclist was breaking the law and that’s what caused the accident. What should have been a cut and dry case of liability ended up being an insurer trying to muddy the waters and unethically blame me for the accident. Even the police report explanation of the accident shows that liability should have landed firmly on the other party’s plate.

I’ve had two decades of experience in this particular industry (insurance; specifically adjusting claims), and after my first interaction with the motorcyclist’s adjuster, I KNEW this was not going to be taken care of properly. I needed a professional negotiator with litigation experience that dealt with accidents.

My first call was to D. Fox Law.

Now keep in mind, this Insurance Carrier is one of the top three Carriers in the nation. They are not a small company! Counselor Fox took care of the issue at hand. His firm sent letters, they called, and in less than two weeks resolved the problem of assigning liability. I’m not sure exactly what he said or did, but when the motorcyclists adjuster called me personally to let me know that they had reconsidered, and that they would be accepting 100% liability, I knew D. Fox Law had made them see the light.

Counselor Fox did an outstanding job.
Great Firm.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words. It makes me very pleased that we were able to obtain the precise results you desired!

I want to give special recognition to Marla for her tenacity in helping us recover additional funds after the original disbursement was issued. Medicare had made made a claim for funds that they were not eligible to receive. Marla followed up on our behalf and ultimately we received additional funds. This was a wonderful blessing, as we still have financial issues from my lymphoma and now we have large expenses accrued because of my pancreatic cancer which I was diagnosed with in August of 2024.
I want to thank the entire staff again for their work in seeing my claim all the way through. I would be happy to recommend your firm to anyone that I might come in contact with in the future who has similar types of needs.

Sincerely thankful,

Steve Peck

reviews.text: I completely handed her a case that was already won and she still took half my settlement wouldn't recommend unless you want to split your settlement..
reviews.ownerResponse:
Calia, I don't think you were ever represented by this office, but if you are posting under a false name, I don't know who you are and have no way of addressing your concern any further.

None of my contingency agreements amount to me taking half or even close to half of anyone's settlement, and none of my cases settle without my client's permission and agreement, so if your statement is truthful, you deserve redress. Every single one of my settlement conferences provide an opportunity for clients to address if they are unhappy with their settlement and to explore other options. I've never settled a case if my client wasn't happy with the settlement, especially if, as you claim, you "completely handed" me a case that was "already won."

Please address your concern to the State Bar of Texas Grievance Hotline at (800) 932-1900.

Further, please remove any statement you have made that as factually untrue and defamatory.

reviews.text:
Well, I never had to engage a criminal attorney before in my life.  But unfortunately our son got into some trouble in Williamson County. He was arrested for one fairly minor charge but was being investigated on a potentially very serious charge.   By use of the internet we found good reviews for Robert Phillips. Of course we were skeptical of online reviews, but by good fortune we were reading those reviews as were driving around the Williamson county jail and police complex and noticed Mr. Phillips' offices nearby.  Our son was sitting in jail and we knew we needed help.   We went into his offices and explained our son's circumstances to his paralegal Janet.  (Mr. Phillips was in trial at that time.) Janet quickly sprung into action on our behalf making various calls to the Williamson county sheriff's office to obtain more information.  My wife and I were provided information about cases Mr. Phillips had worked on and there were literally hundreds.  Not all victories but many favorable outcomes.   Later that day we got to meet Mr. Phillips.

After Mr. Phillips answered a lot of our questions we decided to engage Mr. Phillips' services on behalf of our son.   It was the right decision.  I felt very comfortable with his knowledge and experience.  He explained things straightforwardly to us, he didn't sugar coat anything.  His familiarity with the inner workings of the Williamson county court system was a very big factor in our decision.

Mr. Phillips and his staff kept us informed about the ongoing investigation.  He spoke with police officials and the District Attorney's office on behalf of our son.  I have no doubt that Mr. Phillips represented our son well and presented his side of the story to the authorities.  By good fortune,  good legal defense, and the fact that authorities had a sense of equity after reviewing the circumstances of our case, the authorities decided not to file any further charges against our son.

Our son getting into trouble was a nightmare for our family.  But we made the right choice to hire the services of Mr. Phillips and his office.  I highly recommend engaging him if you ever get into trouble in Williamson county or any Texas county for that matter!

Please note that I did not use my real name for the purposes of writing this review, I want to recommend Mr. Phillips, but I don't want any of my family's business being open to the public.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your experience! We’re glad to hear that Robert and the team were able to provide you with the support and guidance needed during such a challenging time. Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we wish you and your family all the best moving forward.

Being bilingual, Chris was also great at keeping my overprotective Vietnamese dad updated (:

The accident happened June 2021, so in the midst of the pandemic and delays left and right, my car repairs took longer than expected to complete. Although I was originally only supposed to have a rental for thirty days, Becky negotiated additional coverage and certainly eased my anxiety levels since every other conversation with my car manufacturer was along the lines of, "Covid delayed this parts shipment. We don't know when your car will be done."

I could go on and on about the level of detail and support they provided, but this was just one example of how they went above and beyond to ensure I was taken care of. I'm grateful to have had this team handle the paperwork and have all the tough conversations with insurance on my behalf. I work from home, so it would've been a huge pain navigating this process along with my regular job!
Mr. Tran has been very helpful with my auto accident case. Communication has been great and he is very responsive. He took care of everything and made the whole process smooth!

I implore law firms NOT to use this company, as it will only further aggravate your client(s).  This has been a grueling enough process without being flatly ignored by Archer Systems.  Shame on this company!

Same story new day they actually caused more problems than helped I show them facts and proof they tell me wait Months for follow ups call and you get transferred hung up on ask for a manager they have you waiting meanwhile your funds are being held up loads of stress wish I never dealt with this company ever will be filing a complaint ASAP

I wish I could give ZERO stars. Customer service is not in their vocabulary. They change their phone options all the time- requiring you to know an extension number or leave a message. I’ve done that twice now with no return call. The one time I talked to an agent, she was very rude and tried giving me general information despite having my case pulled up. Asking for a supervisor did help in that I got specifics to MY claim. But even that information turned out to be inaccurate. Very frustrating to deal with company.

This company does nothing but give you the run around. They have had 13 months to resolve what they were initially contracted for, and nothing has moved forward. They do not keep up on communications with lawyers, and also can’t answer their phones or return calls.
I think they are a scam. Someone takes your information and then doesn't call back. Fill out the callback form and no one responds. They are in business to collect money, not perform a service.

Poor customer service and communication. It took over twenty-five minutes for me to find out I would need to call back again about my claim, which was received by this company 21 days earlier. Apparently this company's internal business processes are antiquated and need to be updated. Pain and suffering that's the only service this company provides.

Promises made by employees AND MANAGERS but are constantly broken!
My final check was supposed to have been issued 4 months ago and still nothing! Have been speaking with Ms. Lopez but she has nit returned any of my phone calls for almost 2 weeks now! This is the absolute worst company ever!  Hope no one ever has too deal with this company........EVER!

I would LOVE to complain to the courts or whoever I needed to complain to. They take the money that has been settled on and then do NOT take care of what needs to be done. I had to go on Medicare site and pay off remainder of monies owed myself! And now all is paid off and I'm still waiting on money that they have already received on my behalf. this company drags their feet and will hold you settlement money for over a year. I have told them several times that I went to the hospital one time for injuries that I need a dentist not a doctor. reviews.text: I was looking for an expert opinion for my international case that required Mexico and Unites States law knowledge. I contacted Loit & Associates. When they delivered their expert opinion, my financial team was very impressed at the quality of the report. My financial team of experts has worked with lawyers all over the world, and Loit & Associates report stood out because it was very clear, concise and through. The financial team liked it so much that they contacted LOIT & associates and are going to recommend them for future clients.

I’m deeply grateful to the team at Loit & Associates for their outstanding support in securing my work visa. From the very first contact, they were completely transparent about the costs, I knew exactly what the entire process would entail, with no hidden fees or surprises.
Their dedication and personalized attention were exceptional. They guided me through every step with clarity and care, helping me gather and complete all the required documents flawlessly. Thanks to their meticulous organization and unmatched professionalism, I received my visa in less than 15 days!
I highly recommend Loit & Associates to anyone in need of visa or immigration assistance. They are truly experts: efficient, reliable, and a pleasure to work with.

I had an excellent experience with the lawyers who helped me with my work visa process. The service was fast, efficient, and had a very positive outcome. They were always available to answer my questions and guide me every step of the way. I especially want to highlight Mónica's attention; she was very professional and attentive throughout the entire process. 100% recommended.
Monica is very resourceful and helpful!!!

Excellent attention and service. We contacted them to begin the process of obtaining a TN work visa for one of our employees. They initially answered all our questions by phone, and then sent us all the information regarding this type of visa and its associated costs via email. This helped us understand the process much better, and we were able to make the right decision to hire them to handle our case with the immigration authorities.

We are very satisfied with this firm's service. They are truly effective, efficient, punctual, and offer the added benefit of personalized attention. Our process has now concluded successfully, and our company has just welcomed our employee back with an approved TN visa.

HIGHLY RECOMMENDED

I would like to express my gratitude to the team for their excellent attention and service during the processing of my TN and TD visas for my daughters. It was an efficient and thorough process, and they were always available to assist me. Their professionalism and kindness made the process much easier.

Thank you very much!

Excellent service! The staff at this company are incredibly attentive, friendly, and respectful at every step of the process. I wholeheartedly recommend them for any paperwork; they make everything simpler and easier, pay attention to every detail, and are always ready to answer questions and support their clients!

Thank you so much!

Donna and Richard first of all would like to say thank you Monica our attorney for such a wonderful experience with your firm through the years and present. My husband and I purchased a villa in Cozumel Mexico 9 years ago. We had a problem with getting our deed from the seller. The seller was paid in full but refused to release the paperwork needed to show it was paid in full. We had no problem getting it that was easy the rest not so easy a nightmare.
I started my search for attorney that practice law in Mexico so I called one in Dallas Tx. The gentleman I spoke with said he doesn’t do it anymore but he knows attorney that does. I was already stressed out and didn’t know if I was going to get someone that could help. He gave me the number to Loit and Associates in Austin Tx
I said thank you and happy the law firm was close to us.
I called spoke with one of the ladies explaining the situation she said she would have the attorney get back with me.
I thought it would take forever but no it was the same day. I met Monica the attorney in Austin to talk and handle some paperwork to get things going.
When I say this attorney doesn’t waste any time she was on it like a kid eating candy. She gathered up everything I had and went to work. These dealings were in Guadalajara
Mexico. She was there handling business for us. I could not believe it I was feeling so bad to the bone I said that’s what I’m talking about they don’t know who they dealing with lol. This attorney doesn’t play she is on point very confident and knows her stuff. When she has to add more fighting power she pulls out more ammunition. This was quite an experience for us and we thought we had made a mistake but we didn’t. Everything she does she will get with you and ask you questions and how you feel about certain routes to take. She is very up front with pricing and very reasonable. She traveled back and forth for us and got the end results Our Deed to the property. Our neighbor in the next villa over had the same situation we told them about Monica they called her and they got their deed after 9 years.
Anything to do with Mexico is done through our attorney we call and she delivers each and every time.
We have used her for helping us with our small business we are opening up soon she has had to run interference for us on the whole process with people trying to take advantage of us because we didn’t understand certain things. All is going really good and so excited.
We have just returned from Mexico she met us there to help with our permanent residence which we also received. Our outcome with this law firm is amazing. There are other partners there as well Anthony is another one. Please know that if you are interested in purchasing any property or residence in Mexico please contact this firm. We were in a really bad situation back then and could have lost a lot not really knowing what we were doing. Please don’t do anything with out attorney they know the law and they will go to bat for you. They travel where ever you need them to be for you. Fees are very reasonable and they work very well for you. We just recently returned April 27 2024 with our permanent residence. We have been with this law firm now for 9 years and counting Amazing service and awesome attorney to have. Thank you Monica attorney at Loit and Associates. Donna and Richard.
Im very thankful for all the support and advice provided by Monica Loyo, she’s very knowledgeable, and prompt responding any questions I had related to immigration and dual citizenship.

I highly recommend Loit & Associates for legal counsel. They assisted me in resolving a challenging family situation related to family heritage that even other lawyers predicted that it was nearly impossible to resolve. Their knowledge, professionalism, and efficiency in expediting the process were exceptional. I am extremely satisfied with their services and grateful for their expertise in navigating such a complex matter.

Although Loit & Associates couldn't take my case because they are not certified to practice in Los Algodones, Monica was super nice and provided me with useful information and advice. Thank you so much, Monica.

Monica was amazing! After my husband passed away, I needed the original Fideicomiso title changed to my name (not an easy feat) - both my late husband and I are US Citizens.  The system is cumbersome and complicated.  Monica walked me through the steps and assisted with the transactions/steps.  Once that piece was finalized, she assisted with the sale of the property which is quite different than USA real estate transactions.  She reviewed all documents and walked me through the process.
Monica is very competent and her English is perfect.  High recommend if anyone needs legal counsel in Mexico.

Loits & Associates was instrumental in my purchase of a pre-sale apartment in Tulum. Their team not only thoroughly reviewed all documents, including contracts and permits, but also efficiently coordinated requests for information with the seller. Their in-depth research provided invaluable security throughout the entire process. From the beginning to the signing of the contract, their commitment and professionalism were evident. I am grateful for their comprehensive advice and their ability to ensure a smooth and secure transaction. I would recommend Loits & Associates without hesitation!

Monica is an amazingly accomplished and competent attorney. She is licensed to practice in Mexico AND in the United States, and she has practiced law in both countries. As a lawyer myself, I know that alone is a very impressive accomplishment. It also speaks to her advanced English language skills. These abilities and Monica's friendly nature and sensible and pragmatic approach to problem-solving result in excellent, yet affordable, legal services for people in the U.S. who need assistance in Mexico.

I was referred to Monica to set up a Mexican (LLC-like) corporation to be used to purchase a home, as a means to avoid having to use the "fideicomiso" land trust option, which has its disadvantages. Monica walked me through the steps of forming the corporation then assisted me in purchasing a home near the beach in Baja California. With her help I saved thousands of dollars in the purchase process, which in this region can get very expensive with the blizzard of fees those involved in the real estate industry tack onto the home price.

Meanwhile, Monica assisted me in obtaining Permanent Residency immigration status in a convenient and, considering one is dealing with a government agency, very timely fashion. She even put up with my speaking in Spanish during our conversions but would switch into her excellent English when needed to ensure I really understood the specifics of the transaction.

Overall, Monica is competent, knowledgeable and friendly, and she helped me achieve the result I wanted, which I could not have achieved without her help. You really cannot ask for more.
It has been very rewarding working with Loit & Associates. They are excellent lawyers, they resolve problems very well, and they are very attentive.

Excellent professionalism and ability to work quickly and efficiently. They resolved my problems swiftly and were highly prepared, answering my questions and guiding me through the visa application process.

For several years I tried to obtain a work visa with other lawyers; I spent thousands of dollars and countless hours without success. When I met Attorney Monica, she helped and advised me throughout the process, making it much easier. Fortunately, I obtained my work visa thanks to her assistance, and that's why I'm taking the time to highly recommend the firm LOIT & Associates.

Highly recommended. I've used their services twice for my TN visa application. They provide excellent guidance on the steps to follow. They provide personalized service, which is important for this type of process.
Don't hesitate to contact them.
The service is excellent, the process I requested was very quick, as were my appointments. I wholeheartedly recommend LOIT & Associates. Thank you to Monica for everything.
Great service, efficient, they my head firm for all of my inmigration proceedings with all with possitive results.
Excellent service, attorney Monica guided me through the entire process of obtaining my work visa to be legally in the USA without any problems or setbacks.

Reported mvba to the FTC. Mvba contacted me first by text then by postcard that I had traffic fines and if not paid I would be compelled by arrest to do so. Scammers! If I have traffic violations and court fees/fines it's news to me because no municipalities have contacted me in any manner. Also, it's BS putting this on a postcard where everyone at the local post office in my small town can see it.

Scammers. I received a “Notice of Outstanding Fine” from McCreary Veselka Bragg & Allen, P.C., Attorneys at Law, alleging a past due fine from the College Station TX Municipal Court. (I have not lived there in over 10 years.)  I contacted the College Station Municipal Court directly and was told I have no past-due fines and that the municipal court does not work with or contact this law firm. Do not call the number on these letters. Always verify directly with the municipal court using a confirmed phone number.
I received a text from them about delinquent traffic tickets I do not have it seem legit because it comes as a code - I will not call the number back to even check -Professionals will not text you
Scammers! Texting claiming unpaid traffic tickets and to call them to check the status of my "case".

Excellent resource for used car businesses and title loan shops. It can be hard to collect on predatory loans sometimes because desperate people in tight spots just can't be trusted. With MVBA that doesn't matter! Once you've squeezed the last drop of cash from your vict.... customer, they can help you turn a profit because, even at their lowest, a typical targe... customer usually holds on to a car before they finally sleeping under a bridge. Who needs to invest their own money in used car inventory when you can leverage the misfortunes of others? Wish I could give 6 stars!

SCAM! If I could give 0 stars, I would! We recieved a Notice of Intent to File Tax Foreclosure Lawsuit. Basically they are saying we owe $1000 in property taxes for Guadalupe County. This is a LIE! Our taxes are paid from our Escrow and our mortgage company confirmed we are completely paid up. Our mortgage company also connected us with their legal team and they are paying to represent us in a lawsuit against these crooks. Hope your ready! Scammers!!!
I was a client here trying to get more money from several people. This group promised me the world and failed to get me any additional money. Don’t fall for their tricks.
Glad I came here first I see they are sending a letter today glad I see this is a scam
I live in Oklahoma, and I receive monthly threatening violation notices about unpaid fines from this entity. It's a scam. Never been to Sanger, TX in my life.
it's a scam! got a fake warrant paper called the county and confirm there was no warrant! Beware!

FRAUD!!!
They sent me a letter last June 2024 stating that I owed a fine from 2019, a fine I had already paid, so I decided to ignore it. Two months later, they sent me the same letter again, saying the same thing. I had to go in person to the municipal court where they issued me the fine to see what was happening since I had already paid. To my surprise, I did have a fine that they never notified me of. I decided to pay it so I wouldn't owe anything at all. My balance was down to $0, so they sent me the letter again, now with the total balance owed, which is the exact amount I paid. I don't understand what they're gaining by sending this again and ruining people's days. But it's no problem. I have proof that the balance has been paid. I'll contact you when I can to see what's going on.
STOP SCAMMING PEOPLE!!! 😡

Blair Jones is the best lawyer EVER.

Quite literally, if I was charged with the worst possible thing, I suppose murder (whether I did it or not ;) I would pick Blair Jones in a heartbeat, no hesitation, no regret. If we lost the case, I would be positive that if he lost it then every other lawyer surely would have lost it too. But guess what.......HE WOULDNT LOSE IT.

Fr Fr.                                                         (for real for real)

He helped me with charges in two neighboring counties. In one, I had 5 felonies and 1 misdemeanor and he got it all dropped to one misdemeanor charge that was either unnamed or at least very obscure, vague, following my completion of a 30 inpatient rehab. (The charges were pretty serious, and this was nothing compared to most people with my situation.) In the other county, I had a dwi and he did an incredible job with that too. I should also mention I was a hot mess during the entire time, was late consistently and caused a huge scene at a particular court date that ended up getting me arrested. Blair came to see me in jail, to talk about where we would go from there. If you've been to jail, you know how exciting a visit with ANYONE is, lawyers especially (you're always eager to have information on your case), and Blair is such an intelligent, charismatic, handsome, hardworking individual it's really just nice to be associated with him. When in court, both me and my mom noticed people noticing him, as in noticing how professional and efficient he is. He always was the sharpest looking lad in either counties courtroom, always the most bright eyed and bushy tailed. If he was exhausted, uninterested, or unfamiliar with a situation, he never showed it. He seemed to be well acquainted with most if not all of his colleagues/our punishers.

Really, I could go on. I just have to clean my room.
If you can afford him, you should. There are things that are worth a hefty price...he is one of them. He will work with you, your family, and your cases &/or legal concerns with ambition, creativity, efficiency, confidence, professionalism and positivity. He is the ultimate lawyer. Lawyer G.O.A.T.

THANK YOU BLAIR, I HOPE YOU AND YOUR FAMILY ARE DOING WELL.

IRH☆

Blair made the whole process fast and simplistic, I would recommend him to anyone!
Blair Jones is an absolutely outstanding attorney!  He got my case dismissed and my life back on track. It was a blessing to have found him. I highly recommend him.
I was so lucky to get  Mr. Blair Jones as my attorney. He has done an excellent job and helped my case dismissed. You better not get into trouble; If you do, go find Blair.

After interviewing many lawyers I decided to go with Blair. Blair T Jones help me with my 2nd DWI offense in Austin Texas Williamson County to be specific I couldn't of hired a better lawyer he was so sufficient and very helpful in my case ....Mr. Jones help, patience and professionalism help my case go smoother and less stressing than I thought it would. I’m so happy with this firm. Blair was brilliant...approachable, clearly knowledgeable and well respected in the court room. He kept me in the loop by answering every call and contacted me before every change or court date. The outcome was even better than I had hoped for.  Highly recommend.

Without doubt, the best lawyer.

I was falsely accused and was facing a possible 40 year sentence while being innocent. If you have a similar situation, anything unfair, scary, and confusing or have legal needs, regardless of your circumstances, it is definitely an extremely stressful moment.  I highly recommend Mr. Scott Magee as your defense lawyer.

He is polite, knowledgeable, respectful, professional and trustworthy. I believe that his best quality is that he is REALISTIC and honest about your options. No empty promises. Comforting and empathetic during challenges.  He will work hard and relentless on your case.  Aggressively defends you at court no matter the odds or against whom.  Insistent, persistent and won’t get intimidated.  Has the client best interest in his heart.

There are financial options and fair payment plans. He is very willing to help you.  It is considerate of language barriers and cultural differences.

Mrs. Inna performs a very supportive role while being part of his team.  She is exceptionally organized with the paperwork, preparations, calls, transcriptions, all the details that make a big difference.  She is diligent, attentive, kind, flexible, very considerate and conveniently bilingual.

They will guide you every step of the situation.  They have a great client portal system to communicate, share documents and events.  I recommend having abundant patience because legal situations take time, probably months or years.

The result of my case was real.  It changed my life for the better since the case never reached a grand jury for an indictment and the two charges got dismissed for Interest of Justice.  Don’t lose hope.

I will be grateful forever to them.  Thank you and God bless you.

-B. C.-
