reviews.text:
My experience with Diggs & Sadler has been nothing short of exceptional. From the moment I reached out to them for help, I knew I was in capable hands. Kristin Weaver, Chris Knight, Brandy Gregg, and Kristy Banda worked tirelessly on my case, each bringing their unique expertise to the table. Together, they formed an unbeatable team dedicated to achieving the best possible outcome for me and my family.

In particular, I want to express my deepest gratitude to Kristin Weaver. Her unwavering commitment and expertise played a pivotal role in securing the custody of my two sons. Kristin's attention to detail, strategic approach, and compassionate demeanor were evident every step of the way. She went above and beyond to ensure that my case was handled with the utmost care and professionalism, leaving no stone unturned in her pursuit of justice.

Chris Knight, Brandy Gregg, and Kristy Banda also deserve immense praise for their invaluable contributions to my case. Their dedication, knowledge, and support were instrumental in navigating through the complexities of the legal system and ultimately achieving a positive outcome.

Thanks to the relentless efforts of the entire team at Diggs & Sadler, I am now reunited with my beloved sons, and I couldn't be happier. Their expertise, professionalism, and genuine compassion have made all the difference in the world to me and my family. I wholeheartedly recommend Diggs & Sadler to anyone in need of top-notch legal representation. They are truly the best in the business, and I am forever grateful for everything they have done for us.

Mike Araj, Kristin Weaver and Chris Knight have been guiding me through an extremely difficult and foreign process. They have not flinched when it was time to give me tough feedback and always their advice and support has been right on the money. They project a calm confidence in every situation i've seen them in, and that's clearly a result of the dedication, preparation, and experience that they put into representing their clients. I feel blessed to be working with them as they have had my back from day one. I would recommend this team and this firm to people ready to be honest to themselves and to do what's best for their families.

I am beyond pleased with my experience. My case was challenging to say the least, and I was unequipped to represent myself. With thoughtful and detailed advice and feedback from Michael and his team, my divorce settlement was beyond what I'd anticipated.

My concerns with my divorce regarding finances and custody of my child were handled with care and concern. I was walked through the process with every detail explained, and the response time and availability for calls and email replies was unmatched. I'd hoped to never need legal representation, but I am so glad I found this firm. They have truly been lifesavers!
Kristin Weaver is an excellent Attorney! She’s thorough, detail oriented and committed to getting the best results possible. I’d highly recommend her to anyone looking for a no nonsense Attorney!
As a steady advocate for his clients, Michael Araj is thorough, prompt, and persistent in his representation. I have recommended him to friends, and will continue to do so.
They handled my case quickly and with care. Would hire again if I ever need another divorce.

I can’t say enough, just how thankful I am for this firm and people willing to fight for me. Cindy Diggs not only got me going in the right direction, she was so supportive and uplifting in the process, as was her team. I finished out my legal process with Michael Araj and he was exactly what I needed. He listened, made sure we were on the same page, was very down to earth, personable and friendly, and was happy to answer my questions, big or small. The firm was very proactive and efficient, and kept things moving. I was given updates all along the way. I couldn’t have asked for better attorneys.

Going through a divorce is never easy , however having Mrs Kristy Banda by my side really helped. She is very professional and a great listener. When I had any questions or problems understanding the process she would take time to walk me though it and answer my questions. I would highly recommend her.

Absolute sell out, my Attorney Kristy Banda did nothing that I specifically asked for.

Her actions hurt my case and she charged me almost 10k.

I do not recommend this Law Firm nor Kristy Banda as an Attorney.

Look elsewhere, for your legal representation needs!

This company and Attorney broke their oath to fight vigorously for their client.

I was fortunate to have Kristy Banda in my corner during my divorce.  Opposing counsel was unprofessional, to put it nicely, and cost both my ex and I a lot of extra time and money.  Kristy knew their game and was prepared the entire time.  Chris Knight, her brilliant paralegal, was also instrumental in the process.  They’re experienced, competent, and I felt I could trust them.  I’d definitely recommend them.

I have contacted Diggs & Sadler 4 times over the past 3 months to assist with providing an agreement previously filed and no one has responded to my inquiries.  Very disappointed considering they were excellent to work with 12 years ago.

When I sought out for legal aid Diggs & Sadler Ms.Armijo and the whole team were amazing getting everything done was smooth and am grateful to all that was accomplished with their aid,
mr.Araj it was a joy making your acquaintance!

I was amazed working with this extremely thorough and professional group at Diggs and Saddler. Mrs. Kristi Blurton Banda and Mr. Chris Knight were very clear communicators and extremely knowledgeable in getting my case handled effectively.

I was very impressed with the effectiveness and professionalism of Ms. Banda and the entire team at Diggs and Sadler. My concerns were handled empathetically and addressed thoroughly. The intake process was challenging but we took our time and got through all of my concerns one by one. The communication from the team was clear and timely. I was particularly impressed that care was taken to give me only accurate information, and if time was needed to find an answer that was clearly communicated. I was also very grateful for the thorough trial prep, as well as being kept in the loop on how I could assist the the team and save their time and therefore my money!
What a wonderful group of lawyers!

We are so pleased with Mark Morales and his team. We have hired him two times and in those two times we may parole on the first try so if you’re needing to hire a parole lawyer, I highly recommend Mark Morales and team.

To Mark, Jennifer & the whole team at Mark Morales Law Firm.  I want to say how very much I and our whole entire family appreciate all the hard work and dedication you put into helping Cooper make parole!  It was nothing short of the very best representation we have experienced and I can’t say enough great things about your whole team!  From day 1 to the day we received the answer, the assistance was top notch and from the bottom of my heart Thank You!!  Anyone would be a fool not to hire you to help them!  Thanks again So very much!
reviews.ownerResponse:
That’s amazing, we are so grateful to have been a part of your journey, God bless you all!
-Mark

reviews.text: Heard about mark & his team by word of mouth, we hired him & GOT APPROVED FOR PAROLE. Highly recommended

I had a 25 year sentence for robbing a bank. I was habitual. I did every class I could, prayed and hired Mark Morales. He got me an FI-5 on my first review. I did 3 and a half years in total before being released to the halfway house. I have no doubt that Dr. John Lane and Mr. Morales played an integral part in my release. I included a picture of my mug shot and a new picture of me at the Texans game with my wife and son. Thank you to the entire staff.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Praise the Lord & God bless you!

Mark is very honest and compassionate and truly cares for his clients. When I had question about my brothers parole Jennifer responded immediately. On top of that they always include god in their work  which for me was very calming and adds some strength to keep going and to be patient. My brother got incarcerated in his teenage years after 4 years of being incarcerated he made his first parole and will be back home thanks to mark morales and his staff. If your reading this review , this isn’t just any review, this is your sign to hire him to represent your loved one he won’t fail you. He even sent my brother a bible and encouraging messages which my brother was very grateful for, not just any lawyer will do that. 100% recommend.

They were amazing and very efficient with detail they walked me through my brothers case and he was able to come home I love that they are patient and really understand and there for the clients that they are serving.

Mark Morales is an awesome Lawyer,  I recommend him to anyone needing Legal representation.  I hired him to represent my husband at his Parole hearing,  and in just one month of hiring him, my husband got Parole. I'm so thankful for all that he has done.

Mr Morales and his staff are amazing! Very reliable and professional. Walked me through every step of the process. Very kind and courteous! My loved one was approved for parole and we are so thankful for Mr Morales, his staff, and all of the hard work they put in to the case. They genuinely care. THANK YOU!! Keep being great!!
I hired Mr. Morales & Associates for my Brother. They did an excellent job and my brother got a FI-2. Thank you again.

Mark Morales & Associates were incredible throughout my husband’s parole case. Mrs. Diana was compassionate, responsive, and truly supportive every step of the way. Thanks to their hard work and guidance, my husband was approved for parole. I am forever grateful and highly recommend their office.

I highly recommend Mark Morales & Associates to help with your legal issues. Very professional, Christian oriented lawyer. I will always be grateful for the work that Mark and Jennifer did for my brother. They fought for him when we didn’t know where to turn. Their professionalism and compassion gave us comfort during such a stressful time. Because of them, my brother is coming home. This team truly makes a difference.

If you are looking for a parole lawyer I highly recommend Mark Morales and his team. They are very professional, kind and willing to go that extra mile for you and your loved ones. They also make the process as comfortable as possible. Any questions you have are answered very quickly. I would like to thank him and his paralegal Jennifer who specifically worked with me for helping to bring my husband home. God bless him and his team.

Mark Morales and his team were excellent in providing the law services we needed. They are very professional and caring firm.  Always available to answer any questions that we had and their response time was quick . They exceeded in every aspect. We highly recommend them !
Mark Morales and team has been so professional. If anyone needs a great parole lawyer see Mark Morales. God bless Mark and his team

I praise God and my lord and savior. This was a long moment awaiting 20 years later . God was merciful and gracious. Thank you Mark Morales and Diana for doing the good lords work. Truly God is with your law firm.🙏
reviews.ownerResponse: Amen, James! So glad you are home for the holidays! May God bless you and your family…

reviews.text: We have a special needs adult daughter with an Intellectual Disability. She got into some trouble stemming from alcohol that lead to her arrests with multiple charges including an assault charge. Mark Morales was immediately available via phone to provide advice on getting her out of jail. We met face to face within a few days to discuss her situation. He listened and responded with knowledge and sound advice. He utilized the information and facts we gave his office. He included another seasoned attorney Peter Lopez in his office and senior paralegal Arlette Martinez, whom together their team properly and timely responded to all the deadlines, us and knew the people at Williamson County. Our outcome was better than expected! God blessed us with Mark and his office handling these cases!
Mr. Mark Morales and Associates did a great job in helping my son with his case. He got parole. He'll be home soon. Thank you guys 😊

I am so thankful for Mark Morales and his team! After almost ten years they are bringing my husband home. Mark, you and Diana have been the biggest blessing in this process. They are very caring and organized with the parole process, also informative. You are also giving us the biggest blessing of having our family together. Mark is the best parole attorney out there and I highly recommend him to everyone!

reviews.ownerResponse: We are happy to have been of assistance to you. Thank you very much.

reviews.text: Excellent experience! Mark represented my husband for his first eligible parole date and represented him again for free for the next eligible date! He was approved and granted parole. What I love is that they are faith based and very helpful throughout the entire process! It was also nice to have free representation after the first representation! I love this law firm!

Matthew 7:7-8 reads, "Ask, and it will be given to you; seek, and you will find; knock and it will be opened to you. For everyone who asks receives, and he who seeks finds, and to him who knocks it will be opened." My brother served 21 years in prison. I would have calls with him that would break my heart to the core. He would say, "Brother, I need to get out of here already." We asked the Lord and looked then knocked on The Offices of Mark Morales. The Lord fulfilled His promise to us through them! My brother made parole. The Lord is faithful and so were the offices of Mark Morales. Forever grateful!!
reviews.ownerResponse: To God be the glory, thank you for the kind words and God bless you and your family!

reviews.text: Diana and Mark made an almost impossible situation possible, there demeanor was not only professional but also filled with compassion!! I can never thank them enough!!! God bless you

Mark,

I want to express a special thank you for all that you have done in working Brandon's Case. I felt from our initial call that you were an answer to prayer. Jackie
Mark Morales and his office goes above and beyond. The communication and kindness they show are unmatched. I would highly recommend his services.

The Family in marks office is very very helpful they are a family of faith.i spoke to John the first few months before hiring and he was straight up with his answers.Jennifer finished  my husbands case very strong she a Prayer Worrier she also was there for us any time we needed her from responded to our emails less than 24 hours and even Called me on the weekend.i highly recommend this law firm God bless you guys and the law business My Husband Is Coming Home he did 7years on a 55 year sentence non aggravated
Mark's office made us feel like our case was personal to them.  I hope I never need their services again but I wouldn't hesitate to call them if I did.

If u r looking for a lawyer look no more! Mr Mark Morales is the one ! My name is Tracy Shaw inmate number 658133 I did 33 years in TDC I received 12 set offs while I was thear a friend of mine told me if I want to go home I need to hire Mark morales I felt like that parole later thing was a scam but I hired him anyway I got a fl1 so look people can't say wrong about mark and Jennifer around me because my sister was on the phone when Mark talk to the lead voter she told me m a rk did and said everything to get those people to release me so make up your on mind but I'm a free man because Mark just do your part and stay case free attend classes and pry. Mark will do the rest.God bless my people in white

reviews.text:
MY BROTHER IS COMING HOME!!

We are incredibly grateful to Mark Morales, his assistant Jennifer, and the entire office staff for their dedication, professionalism, and faith throughout my brother’s parole process. This was his third parole hearing, and after being denied twice with a different attorney, my father decided to hire Mark—and we’re so thankful he did.

Mark got the job done. After serving 14 years on a 20-year sentence, my brother was finally granted parole. This was something we had been praying and hoping for, and Mark’s experience and commitment truly made the difference.

Throughout the process, the office kept my father and sister fully informed every step of the way. Their communication, care, and compassion meant so much to our family during such a stressful time.

What truly stood out to us is that this is a faith-based law office. They believe in the power of prayer, and their compassion and faith were evident in every step of the journey. We sincerely thank Mark, Jennifer, and the entire team for their support, guidance, and belief in our family. May God continue to bless them in the work they do for others.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Cristy for the kind words, it was an honor to represent your brother. God bless you all!

reviews.text: Everyone here as has been amazing! Mainly working with peter and arlette they have showed me nothing but kindness! After not knowing what wasgoing on. They took the time to explain everything to me. Never been in any trouble, they walked me through every step, clarifying everything thing to me. Thank you so much!!! Ya'll have been amazing! ❤️
Very good  your in the best hands. Mark morales got me parole in 2/1 2 years on a 12 your sentence. He really represents you to the fullest!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you, Chris. I am so happy to see your smiling face, God bless you and I pray for a long life of success and happiness.!
-Mark

reviews.text: Mark and Arlette were amazing.  They took care of our issue with amazing skill!  Even more important they were very compassionate and answered all our, probably, stupid questions and concerns as quickly as possible to keep us sane in this situation.

I would like to thanks, Mark, Morales, and Jennifer and staff for all their hard work. They have worked really hard for my son andrew freer he had a 25 year sentence and he is finally going to be able to come home already so I really give a five star for Mark Morales and his caring stuff. They treat you like family with all their love and kindness and caring would like to thank you guys All your hard work

Very happy with the services that we received from Mark Morales & Jennifer. They were very informative and quick to respond to any questions we had. If the need ever arises, we would definitely use them again.

My loved one and I obtained Mark Morales law firm when he was already in review for parole and they took us on right away and started working on everything he needed for his hearing. They were quick, efficient, incredibly responsive. Jennifer was who I communicated with and I always got a response within 24 hours. I felt the team was very professional and guided me through this process perfectly. They were transparent and my experience was exactly what they said it would be. I appreciate their help and the one thing I absolutely wanted to happen, which was me being able to speak at my loved one’s hearing, did happen. Now my loved one is coming home and I couldn’t be more excited! Thank you Mark and Jennifer!
BIG thank you to Mark Morales, my husband was supposed to come out in August 2026 thanks to  Mark and his team he’s coming home August 2025! Thank you and 100% recommend!!
Mark and Jennifer are amazing! They represented my husband and he made his FIRST parole. 3 years on a 7 year sentence.I will be recommending them to everyone I know.

Mark Morales and Jennifer are so great!! My husband is coming home on a FI2 in July 2025! Mark was so great, he said all the perfect things! Jennifer his assistant is amazing too, she is by your side the entire way! I couldn’t imagine having any other attorney by our side!! Jennifer and Mark were also very close to my mom and treated her like family, and I couldn’t be more thankful, my mom loved Jennifer and mark also, as she used them as well and they are were so sweet to my momma in which whom I lost a year ago!! If you are looking for a parole attorney..you will not be disappointed!! Thank you again Mark Morales and Jennifer, I been screaming to the roof top all morning and crying with tears of joy!!!!

Mark Morales first impressed me by telling me the truth: “Gary, I’m not going to promise you I can get you home; that is God’s will…His work.” Mark never said, ”if”, but “when” in reference to me coming home; that kind of honest humility and commitment to serving God faithfully instead of himself showed me I had the right team in my corner. Mark immediately set out to contacting family and myself, read everything we provided, and obviously did an excellent job of presenting me to the Parole Board as a man instead of a number, and helped me bring home the fact that I am in a position to be a great benefit to society and my community - as my history in TDCJ had evidenced. Me. Morales convinced the Board to allow me to put actions to our words…and they let me go: my first parole attempt after a thirty-year incarceration.
I would, and will recommend Mark Morales and his team to anyone in need of his help - providing the individual in question can and will put God first; that is because that is what makes Mr.Morales successful: he serves a greater purpose than to get rich, and a greater Rewarder for it.
reviews.ownerResponse:
I am humbled by your review. God is good! We thank Him, because without Him, I am nothing. It was an honor to serve you & to be a small part of you coming home. God bless.

-Mark

reviews.text: I was sentenced to 38 years on a murder charge and was not eligible for parole until 19 years. Word around the system was murder charges rarely made parole the first time up. Well, I beat the odds and Mark Morales and his team played a large part in my newfound freedom. Because of their representation I am now able to prove to society that I’m not only a productive member of society, I have become a pillar of the community, just  like I was privileged enough to be within the prison walls. They did a fantastic job making sure the parole board seen the good man I have became and all of my accomplishments during my sentence. Most important is the prayer and faith they were sure to put foremost in the entire process.
reviews.ownerResponse: We thank you, and we thank the Almighty for the success. We pray nothing but the best for you and your family and we know God has great plans for you! God bless, Mark

reviews.text:
You need a great and reliable person Ely Valentine should be your first choice, great in listening and gets you what you want, and fights for you.
Thank you Ely. Valentine for everything...

I was introduced to Mrs. Valentine by a good friend and an experienced litigator. She highly recommended Mrs. Valentine. My experience with her and her office has been terrific. They are professional, focused, attentive to detail and reasonably responsive. I consider myself lucky to have been represented by her. It all went just like she said, no surprises. Do yourself a favor, give her office a call next time you need legal representation.
The whole team was so incredible. Very caring, empathetic, and thorough! Super appreciated all the time they took with me.

Always good follow up and very friendly very satisfying
i will recommend people
thanks for hard working
I highly recommend Ely, Valentine & Reed, PLLC, for their dedicated client service and proactive communication throughout the legal process. I confidently endorse their services..
they where responsible and kept me updated on any changes that came. they where able to get me the highest amount for my accident. very professional and proficient in their work.

Oh my god! I cannot begin to tell you how helpful this firm has been. I am going to recommend this firm for anyone who needs an amazing personal injury lawyer! We live in Liberty Hill and didn’t want to go into Austin for counsel, nice to find someone knowledgeable and trustworthy in our area.  Kudos to Shanna Valentine.

Great team. Shanna is just amazing, she helped with everything and provided great advice. She also cares about you. If I ever needed their services again, I would without a doubt go to them. I have already recommended them to others. This team helped me with an automobile case and walked me through every step.

I was in a motor vehicle accident, hit by another driver.  My car was totaled out.
Feeling pressured to make decisions I started doing some Google searches for an attorney, I came across Ely, Valentine & Reed.  Ms. Valentine listened thoroughly and  was very patient with me and updated me with all the information that I needed to provide to her and her team.  Both Ms. Valentine and Ms. Moni did not waste any time getting things done in order for timely filing of documents. From start to finish this team of Professionals, are  kind, honest, and very patient and got the job done.
I appreciated all their help and guidance.  I am very thankful they were there to help me.

Ely ,Valentine and Reed were recommended to me by a friend after i was injured in a car accident . I couldn’t be happier with their work. I gave them all the doctor bills and police report and they did the rest. No muss no fuss. Will definitely use them again if needed . Special thanks to Shanna.
Eddie S.

Wonderful firm! The attorneys and staff are professional, quickly responsive to questions. They helped  make a tough situation (dog bite) easier to manage. They treat you like you are long time friends; very warm and welcoming. If I could give them 10 or 100 stars, I would. 🤠

I recently reached out to Shanna after being hit by a company vehicle. Fortunately, I wasn’t injured, but she advised me to file a diminished value claim with their insurance, a concept I had never even heard of before. After doing some research, I followed her advice, submitted a claim, and ended up receiving an additional check, simply for asking!

What stands out to me is that Shanna offered this valuable guidance without me even needing to hire her. It truly speaks to her dedication and the way she looks out for her clients, always ensuring they have the knowledge and support they need. I can’t recommend her enough!

Shanna and her team are like no other law firm! Their attention to detail and personal connection you get by working with them is unmatched. The EVR team is my go-to personal injury firm.
Professional, responsive and very easy to work with. They are my new go to for all my legal needs.

Thank you to all of the Ely, Valentine, and Reed team. They did such amazing and quick work. I am so glad they helped me with my accident. Hopefully never need theor services again, but if I do, I am coming to them!

Thank you!

I am so glad I decided to call..
Shanna Made this Experience runs so smooth and easy for me . She was so knowledgeable and helpful in every way..!!
Very kind and Sweet.
I've already passed the word to anybody I know.
If Needed.I will definitely call her again!!
Thank you!!!

Shanna and her team took great care of me during a Very traumatic year. They remained in communication with me and helped me tremendously.

I say this with love and respect: I hope I never need them again lol

I am happy my friend Gary Kasper referred them to me.
I was referred to EVR law firm by a friend, when I told my nextdoor neighbor(attorney) who's representing me for my accident, he said "that's one of the best law firms". I agree.

I highly recommend Ely Valentine and Reed. They are phenomenal. The process took 2 years but it was worth it because Shanna will make sure she has everything as fast as possible to be able to complete everything to make sure her clients are taken care of as if they are her family.

I had a great experience working with Ely, Valentine & Reed! Nick worked with me after my car accident and connected me with various providers that helped me, and Shanna was great with negotiating a settlement to make sure I received a fair amount. I’m extremely happy with the outcome and the way it was handled; Shanna and Nick were professional, communicative, and great to work with. I highly recommend this practice!
Honest, caring and very efficient - considering the red tape they usually have to combat! Staff very accessible and friendly!
Awesome place for your legal needs in injury. Shanna and Moni were great people to work with, very nice, very attentive. Any question i had were answered ASAP.

Thank you, Shanna Valentine, Mr. Ely, and your great staff for all you have done for me. My wife and I are very grateful for the way you protected and took care of me after I was rear-ended. Thank you for your perseverance,  and for making sure I was taking care of. It was great not having to worry knowing that I was in good hands.

Jose Arguelles

However if I do Shanna will be my go to attorney.I will be referring everyone I know to her and this firm also! ❤️
